title: Strengthen proposal workspace filtering truth
summary: Tighten the native proposal workspace so filtering and summaries reflect validation and apply-preview readiness truth directly, without forcing users to inspect each artifact row by row.
acceptance_criteria: The native proposal workspace can filter proposal artifacts by validation status and apply-preview readiness.
Workspace summaries reflect readiness and validation truth in a scan-friendly way.
Selected artifact detail stays aligned with the currently visible filtered artifact set.
The slice reuses the existing proposal artifact parser and read-only metadata model.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal workspace now filters artifacts by validation status and apply-preview readiness in addition to the existing scope, status, coverage, and sort controls.
Shared artifact selection now synchronizes with the currently visible filtered artifact set so the detail panel does not keep showing an artifact hidden by active filters.
Proposal workspace now shows a dedicated apply-preview readiness summary grid with ready, review, and blocked counts.
Validated the ticket schema for the solved slice.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the proposal workspace filtering slice.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

trigger.source_ref: Re-ranked Top 10 after HS-0021: proposal workspace already exists, but filtering truth still underrepresents validation and apply-preview readiness.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep the workflow read-only and repo-aware.
Prefer shared proposal workspace truth over duplicating readiness logic in separate inspectors.
